THE SHIFT

## How the Apex Consumer plays the system.

Your customers know how your marketing works, and they’re using it to their advantage.

![](https://live-iterable-com.pantheonsite.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/70a.png)

of consumers game their online carts to score discounts.

![](https://live-iterable-com.pantheonsite.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/71a.png)

of consumers rotate services based on promotions.

![](https://live-iterable-com.pantheonsite.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/55a.png)

delay purchases for better offers.

![](https://live-iterable-com.pantheonsite.io/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/64a.png)

start free trials intending to cancel.

Source: 2026 Customer Engagement Research Report

the data

## See the data behind the shift.

The 2026 Customer Engagement Report exposes where marketing is falling behind the consumer. Based on insights from 1,000 consumers and 500 marketers, it breaks down behavior hacks, bottlenecks, and the changes required to adapt.

Get the Insights

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/CER-cover.png)

THE PROBLEM

## Why most marketing can’t keep up.

Most teams are still operating on fixed journeys, delayed signals, and disconnected systems. The longer marketing waits to adapt, the more it falls behind the consumer.

64%

admit their personalization is more about optics than feedback.

40%

are quietly absorbing more work even with AI.

60%

of marketers take 2-4 weeks to act on campaign learnings.

71%

avoid changing live programs because downstream effects feel unpredictable.

the answer

Today’s customers don’t wait, and neither can marketing. Iterable’s goal-driven AI turns signals into action, adapting every interaction in real time.
